title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Jodhpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates:
Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates!
